responses.answer:
Based on the provided context, here are the policies for Shipping, Delivery, and Pick-Up:

**Shipping**

* Standard Delivery:
	+ Delivery will take from 3 to 7 working days upon confirmation of order (excluding weekend & public holidays) where your order will be processed and dispatched from our warehouse.
	+ This may take longer during sales period.
	+ Payment must be made within the standard delivery timeframe, or any late payments will incur additional fees.

**Delivery**

* Delivery is only applicable for West Malaysia only.
* Delivery is available at selected locations, with majority of products entitled to pick up services except for big items.
* Delivery may take longer during sales period.

**Pick-Up**

* Pick-up will be available after a second email will be sent to you shortly after (excluding weekend & public holidays) where your order will be processed and dispatched from our warehouse to the selected pick-up point during online checkout.
* Majority of products are entitled for pick up services, except for big items.
* Pick-up is available at the selected locations from 5pm onwards.

Please note that these policies apply to selected items on the Site only.

responses.question: What are the policies for Data Security?
responses.ground_truth: implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measuresto protect your Personal Data from unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure.
responses.contexts:
["policies of every website you visit before providing any personal data.
9. Your Data Subject Rights Under the PDPA
Under the PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
a) Access: You may request access to and obtain a copy of your Personal Data held by us. However, we may be permitted by law to refuse access in certain
circumstances.
b) Correction/Update: You may request to correct or update your personal data that is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.
c) Restriction: You may request to limit the use of your personal data, provided that such restrictions do not apply to the processing of mandatory personal
data.
d) Withdrawal of Consent:
You may withdraw your consent to the processing of your Personal Data at any time, subject to legal or contractual restrictions. Please refer to Clause 10 for
the consequences of withdrawing consent.
e) Deletion/Anonymisation (if necessary):", "to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period
We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, to fulfil the purposes for which it was
collected or to comply with legal, regulatory, or accounting requirements. Upon expiry of the retention period, or when the data is no longer required, we
will take reasonable steps to permanently delete, destroy, or anonymise the data.
14. Additional Conditions:
a) As a subscriber of our Site, you may correct or update your personal data by clicking on the 'My Account' link at the top of any page, entering your ID,
password and birth date when prompted and clicking the Edit Information button. The changes you make will be reflected in our databases instantly.
b) Any request made under Clause 9 shall be subject to PDPA and all relevant regulations.", "b) Process your membership, contest entries, or transactions.
c) Communicate with you regarding promotions and offers.
11. Right to Opt-Out of Direct Marketing
You may request that we cease using your personal data for direct marketing purposes through:
a) unsubscribe within any of the promotional email; or
b) contacting our Customer Service
We will process your request within a reasonable period as required by the PDPA.
12. Data Security
We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from
unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure. Access to your Personal Data is restricted
to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period"]
responses.answer:
According to the provided context, the policies for data security under the Personal Data Protection Act 2019 (PDPA) of Singapore include:

* Implementing and maintaining reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect personal data from unauthorized or unlawful processing.
* Restricting access to personal data on a need-to-know basis to authorized personnel only.
* Regularly reviewing and updating security policies and procedures to ensure they remain effective in protecting personal data.

These policies are outlined in several clauses of the PDPA, including:

* Clause 11: Right to Opt-Out of Direct Marketing
* Clauses 12-14: Data Security

It is worth noting that the specific details of these policies may not be provided in the context, but based on the information given, it can be inferred that data security measures are in place to protect personal data from unauthorized or unlawful processing.

i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)", "d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?
If the item is covered by Replacement Warranty, you may bring the item to any senQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty
accordingly.
e) How do I return an item?
You may contact or email us (Refer Clause 18 below).
9. Refunds
Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered the mode of refund based on your payment mode and may be
required to enter additional information.
When will I receive my refund? Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered mode of refund based on your
payment mode, which will take between 1 to 15 working days depending on our partnering banks. Please consult the table below for details.
HOW YOU INITIALLY PAID FOR YOUR ORDER HOW YOU MAY RECEIVE YOUR REFUND EXPECTED TIME TO TRANSFER FUNDS
Credit card, debit card Credit card/debit card charge reversal (refund) Up to 15 working days", "i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)
ii) Item must be in new condition and returned in its original packaging along with all accessories (including manuals, warranty cards, certificate of
authenticity) and free gifts received with it. All packaging must be unused, unmarked and not defaced in any manner.
iii) Item must be unused or hasn’t been installed.
iv) All securely sealed items must not be opened, especially electronic items (unless our service centre can ascertain that they were found defective at the
time of opening).
c) Will I get a refund in case of returning the item?
You will be eligible for a full refund if the item has been inspected and verified that the item was in perfect condition as described above.
d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?"]
responses.answer:
According to the context, it appears that SenQ (or Senheng) has a specific policy regarding returns. The key points are:

1. Returns must be made within 7 calendar days upon receipt of an order.
2. Items must be returned in their original packaging with all accessories and free gifts received with them.
3. Returns must be shipped back to SenQ (or Senheng) within 7 calendar days upon receipt.

Regarding the question about policies regarding returns after 7 calendar days upon receipt, it seems that SenQ's policy is as follows:

- If an item is returned after 7 calendar days upon receipt, it may not be eligible for a full refund.
- However, if the item is covered by Replacement Warranty, you can bring it to any SenQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty accordingly.

It's worth noting that this policy applies to certain items listed as "not eligible" in section 8 of the Return / Exchange Policy.

responses.question: What are the policies for Shipping, Delivery, and Pick-Up?
responses.ground_truth: Delivery will take from 3 to 7 working days upon confirmation of order where your order will be processed and dispatched from our warehouseAll small appliances & digital gadgets will be charged with a standard rate of RM8 as courier fee.Delivery is only applicable for West Malaysia only. ["delivery fee.
iii) All small appliances & digital gadgets will be charged with a standard rate of RM8 as courier fee.
iv) Delivery is only applicable for West Malaysia only.
v) Applicable to selected items on the Site only.
vi) Basic installation will be provided without charges for purchases of bigger items, unless otherwise mentioned.
vii) A signature is required upon receiving your order as a proof of receipt.
B. Pick Up Service
i) Pick up will be available after a second email will be sent to you shortly after (excluding weekend & public holidays) where your order will be processed
and dispatched from our warehouse to the selected pick-up point during online checkout. This may take longer during sales period.
ii) Majority of the products are entitled for pick up services, except for big items.
iii) Pick up will be available at the selected locations from 5pm onwards.", "iii) Pick up will be available at the selected locations from 5pm onwards.

senQ will proceed with cancellation should circumstances below occur:
a) The item is not / no longer available
b) Pricing disputes arise
c) Product illustration differs from actual product
d) Payment failed or not received
e) Payment information could not be verified

i) Any other unforeseen circumstances that lead to cancellation
Upon cancellation, refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days.
8. Return / Exchange Policy", "i) any credit card information you supply is true, correct and complete;
ii) charges incurred by you will be honoured by your credit card company; and
iii) you will pay the charges incurred by you at the posted prices, including any shipping fees and applicable taxes.
b) Admin Fee
Due to the backend efforts in managing credit planning, we levy an administrative fee to any purchases that are made with the IPP mode of payment for
12 months period and above. IPP for 6 months and below will be waived of such fee. Such fee shall vary depending on the payment tenure of IPP and/or
BNPL, and any changes will be notified in advance.
6. Shipping, Delivery and Pick-Up
A. Standard Delivery
i) Delivery will take from 3 to 7 working days upon confirmation of order (excluding weekend & public holidays) where your order will be processed and
dispatched from our warehouse. Please note that this may take longer during sales period. ii) Paid PlusOne member is entitled to 34% discount for home"]
responses.answer:
The policies for Shipping, Delivery, and Pick-Up are as follows:

### Shipping
- **Delivery Timeframe**: 
  - Standard delivery will take from 3 to 7 working days upon confirmation of order (excluding weekends and public holidays).
  - This timeframe may extend during sales periods due to increased demand.
  
- **Courier Fee**:
  - Delivery will be charged a standard rate of RM8 as courier fee.

### Delivery
- **General Coverage**:
  - Delivery is only applicable for West Malaysia.  
  - Applicable items on the site are subject to this delivery policy.

### Pick-Up
- **Pick-up Availability**:
  - Pick-up services will be available at selected locations from 5 PM onwards.
  
- **Availability of Items**: 
  - Majority of products can be picked up, except for big items. 

This comprehensive overview covers the key policies related to shipping, delivery, and pick-up as outlined in the provided context.

responses.question: What are the policies for cancellation policy?
responses.ground_truth: The item is not / no longer available, Pricing disputes ariseProduct illustration differs from actual productUpon cancellation, refunds will be processed within 14 working days.
responses.contexts:
["iii) Pick up will be available at the selected locations from 5pm onwards.
** In the event that you are not available to collect your order on the assigned date, you may contact or email us (Refer Clause 18 below).
7. Cancellation Policy
senQ reserves the right to hold or cancel any order with prior notice when deemed necessary.
senQ will proceed with cancellation should circumstances below occur:
a) The item is not / no longer available
b) Pricing disputes arise
c) Product illustration differs from actual product
d) Payment failed or not received
e) Payment information could not be verified
f) The order cannot be shipped to the address provided or where the shipping address could not be verified
g) Violation of Senheng's Terms and Conditions
h) Cancellation initiated by the Customer
i) Any other unforeseen circumstances that lead to cancellation
Upon cancellation, refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days.
8. Return / Exchange Policy", "Upon cancellation, refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days.
8. Return / Exchange Policy
a) What is the return policy? Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.
i) Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered. The model or colour is different from what is indicated on the order summary, or there are missing items
or parts inside the packaging.
ii) Damaged: The item is found to be damaged upon receipt.
iii) Defective: The product is not functioning as described by the manufacturer.
Certain items are not eligible to be returned or refunded, such as fridge and washing machine due to certain issues.
b) Returned items must meet the following requirements:
i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)", "the consequences of withdrawing consent.
e) Deletion/Anonymisation (if necessary):
You may request to delete or anonymise your personal data, subject to applicable terms and conditions.
To exercise any of these rights, you may choose one of the following methods:
i) Contact our Customer Careline Agent (see Clause 15 "Contact Us" for details);
ii) Notify us in writing through our Customer Service Department; or
iii) If you are a PlusOne® member, you may submit a Cancellation Form available in the PlusOne® Terms and Conditions. A dedicated agent will contact
you to proceed with the necessary steps.
10. Consequences of Withdrawing Consent
Except for the purpose of Clause 6, please note that withdrawing or withholding your consent for the processing of Personal Data may affect our ability to:
a) Provide you with our services or products.
b) Process your membership, contest entries, or transactions.
c) Communicate with you regarding promotions and offers."]
responses.answer:
The policies for the cancellation policy include:

1. **Cancellation Policy**: senQ reserves the right to hold or cancel any order with prior notice when deemed necessary.
2. **Cancellation Reasons**: Certain circumstances may lead to cancellation, including:
   - The item is not / no longer available.
   - Pricing disputes arise.
   - Product illustration differs from actual product.
   - Payment failed or not received.
   - Payment information could not be verified.
   - The order cannot be shipped due to an incorrect address or where the shipping address could not be verified.
   - Violation of Senheng's Terms and Conditions.
   - Cancellation initiated by the Customer.
   - Any other unforeseen circumstances that lead to cancellation.

3. **Cancellation Process**: Upon cancellation, a refund will be processed accordingly, with processing time potentially taking up to 14 working days.

4. **Return / Exchange Policy**: The return or exchange policy states that upon cancellation, most orders are eligible for a full refund within 7 calendar days of receipt if they are incorrect, damaged, or defective. However, there are certain items not eligible for returns or refunds due to specific reasons like fridges and washing machines.

5. **Cancellation Notification Methods**: The customer has the option to contact the Customer Careline Agent (see Clause 15 "Contact Us"), notify by writing through their Customer Service Department, or use a Cancellation Form if they are a PlusOne® member.

responses.question: What are the policies for Data Security?
responses.ground_truth: implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measuresto protect your Personal Data from unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure.
responses.contexts:
["policies of every website you visit before providing any personal data.
9. Your Data Subject Rights Under the PDPA
Under the PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
a) Access: You may request access to and obtain a copy of your Personal Data held by us. However, we may be permitted by law to refuse access in certain
circumstances.
b) Correction/Update: You may request to correct or update your personal data that is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.
c) Restriction: You may request to limit the use of your personal data, provided that such restrictions do not apply to the processing of mandatory personal
data.
d) Withdrawal of Consent:
You may withdraw your consent to the processing of your Personal Data at any time, subject to legal or contractual restrictions. Please refer to Clause 10 for
the consequences of withdrawing consent.
e) Deletion/Anonymisation (if necessary):", "to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period
We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, to fulfil the purposes for which it was
collected or to comply with legal, regulatory, or accounting requirements. Upon expiry of the retention period, or when the data is no longer required, we
will take reasonable steps to permanently delete, destroy, or anonymise the data.
14. Additional Conditions:
a) As a subscriber of our Site, you may correct or update your personal data by clicking on the 'My Account' link at the top of any page, entering your ID,
password and birth date when prompted and clicking the Edit Information button. The changes you make will be reflected in our databases instantly.
b) Any request made under Clause 9 shall be subject to PDPA and all relevant regulations.", "b) Process your membership, contest entries, or transactions.
c) Communicate with you regarding promotions and offers.
11. Right to Opt-Out of Direct Marketing
You may request that we cease using your personal data for direct marketing purposes through:
a) unsubscribe within any of the promotional email; or
b) contacting our Customer Service
We will process your request within a reasonable period as required by the PDPA.
12. Data Security
We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from
unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure. Access to your Personal Data is restricted
to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period"]
responses.answer:
The data security policies of this website include:

- Implementing and maintaining reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorised or unlawful processing.
- Restricting access to your personal data to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis.
- Regularly reviewing and updating the security policies and procedures.

responses.question: What about policies of Return Policy?
responses.ground_truth: Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered.
responses.contexts:
["Upon cancellation, refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days.
8. Return / Exchange Policy
a) What is the return policy? Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.
i) Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered. The model or colour is different from what is indicated on the order summary, or there are missing items
or parts inside the packaging.
ii) Damaged: The item is found to be damaged upon receipt.
iii) Defective: The product is not functioning as described by the manufacturer.
Certain items are not eligible to be returned or refunded, such as fridge and washing machine due to certain issues.
b) Returned items must meet the following requirements:
i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)", "d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?
If the item is covered by Replacement Warranty, you may bring the item to any senQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty
accordingly.
e) How do I return an item?
You may contact or email us (Refer Clause 18 below).
9. Refunds
Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered the mode of refund based on your payment mode and may be
required to enter additional information.
When will I receive my refund? Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered mode of refund based on your
payment mode, which will take between 1 to 15 working days depending on our partnering banks. Please consult the table below for details.
HOW YOU INITIALLY PAID FOR YOUR ORDER HOW YOU MAY RECEIVE YOUR REFUND EXPECTED TIME TO TRANSFER FUNDS
Credit card, debit card Credit card/debit card charge reversal (refund) Up to 15 working days", "i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)
ii) Item must be in new condition and returned in its original packaging along with all accessories (including manuals, warranty cards, certificate of
authenticity) and free gifts received with it. All packaging must be unused, unmarked and not defaced in any manner.
iii) Item must be unused or hasn’t been installed.
iv) All securely sealed items must not be opened, especially electronic items (unless our service centre can ascertain that they were found defective at the
time of opening).
c) Will I get a refund in case of returning the item?
You will be eligible for a full refund if the item has been inspected and verified that the item was in perfect condition as described above.
d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?"]
responses.answer:
The return policy for most orders is available within 7 calendar days from the date of receipt if they are incorrect (model or color mismatch), damaged, or defective. Certain items may not be eligible for returns due to issues such as fridges and washing machines that aren't covered by replacement warranties.

Returned items must meet specific requirements, including being shipped back within 7 days with proof of postage or courier receipt, in new condition, in its original packaging, along with all accessories and free gifts. 

For damaged or defective products returned under the "Replacement Warranty" program, you can bring them to any SenQ (or Senheng) outlet for verification and processing of a return warranty.

A full refund is available if the item has been inspected and verified as in perfect condition as described above. The expected time for receiving your refund depends on how your order was initially paid; it could take between 1 to 15 working days, based on your chosen payment method, plus an additional 10-15 business days from our bank transfers.

You cannot return a damaged or defective product after the initial 7-day period unless you are eligible for the "Replacement Warranty" program and bring them directly to an authorized outlet.

6. Shipping, Delivery and Pick-Up

responses.answer:
Okay, here’s an explanation of the shipping, delivery & pick up policy based on the context you've provided:

Regarding shipping, delivery, and pick-up, senQ has several policies implemented to ensure a smooth process for both customers and warehouse operations. Here's a breakdown:

**Shipping:**

*   **Standard Delivery:**
    *   Delivery times are approximately 3-7 working days after order confirmation (excluding weekends and public holidays).
    *   Your order will be dispatched from the warehouse to your designated pick-up point during checkout.  This process may take a bit longer than usual during promotional periods, but it is guaranteed to happen within 3 to 7 working days.
    *   Paid PlusOne members receive a 34% discount for orders being shipped locally.

**Delivery:**

*   **Available For Selected Items Only:** Delivery specifically applies only to West Malaysia (Malaysia).
*   **Location-based Pick Up Service:**  SenQ provides pick up service at selected locations throughout the country on Thursdays from 5pm onwards, and potentially other dates depending on availability.

**Pick-Up Service:**

*   **Email Notification:** You will receive an email after your order is processed to inform you of the pick-up time.
*   **Postponed Pick Up:**  If you are not available at the assigned date, you can contact or email us (refer to Clause 18 below) regarding rescheduling your pick up.
*   **Time Limit for Pick Up:** The selected locations offer a pick up service from 5 PM onwards.

Do you need any more details on a specific aspect of these policies?

10. Consequences of Withdrawing Consent

responses.answer:
senQ reserves the right to hold or cancel any order with prior notice when deemed necessary. Here’s a breakdown of the cancellation policy:

**Key Aspects of the Cancellation Policy:**

*   **Right to Cancel with Notice:** If senQ deems it necessary, they can cancel an order with a minimum of 7 calendar days' notification beforehand. This allows them time to handle any issues that might arise from the order.
*   **Reasons for Cancellation – Potential Outcomes:** The cancellation is permitted due to several reasons:

    *   **Item Not Available/No Longer Offered:** If the item you ordered is no longer available, either discontinued or removed entirely from the product catalog, it's a permissible reason for cancellation.
    *   **Pricing Disputes:** If there arises disagreement about the price of an item – perhaps due to miscalculation or disputes over pricing changes – cancellation might be considered a solution.
    *   **Product Illustration Differs from Actual Product:**  If the item you received doesn’t match what was displayed on the order summary, this is grounds for cancellation. This could include missing parts, different colors/designs, or other discrepancies.
    *   **Payment Issues (failed/not received):** If payment fails or isn't received, cancellation is possible based on senQ’s policy.
    *   **Order Cannot Be Shipped to the Address:** If the order can’t be sent to the specified address because of logistical problems – such as a delivery failure or verification issues – it triggers potential cancellation. 
    *   **Violation of Senheng's Terms and Conditions:**  If the order violates any of senHeng’s rules and regulations, this constitutes grounds for cancellation.
    *   **Cancellation Initiated by the Customer:** You, as the customer, can initiate a cancellation request.
    * **Unforeseen Circumstances:** In case of any unexpected problem that arises during processing or delivery – such as unforeseen legal issues, security threats, and other situations requiring urgent action – you may cancel your order.

*   **Requirements for Returned Items (upon Cancellation):**  If you cancel an order, the items you've ordered are returned to senQ under these conditions:

    *   The item must be shipped back within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proven by the postal or courier receipt).

* **Other Considerations:**
     *   You are entitled to the consequences of withdrawing your consent. If your consent is withdrawn, you could lose access to certain services or products offered by senQ.
  *  **Deletion/Anonymization:** SenQ may request to delete or anonymize your personal data if necessary; this process is subject to applicable terms and conditions.

I hope this detailed explanation clarifies the cancellation policy!

responses.question: What are the policies for Data Security?
responses.ground_truth: implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measuresto protect your Personal Data from unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure.
responses.contexts:
["policies of every website you visit before providing any personal data.
9. Your Data Subject Rights Under the PDPA
Under the PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
a) Access: You may request access to and obtain a copy of your Personal Data held by us. However, we may be permitted by law to refuse access in certain
circumstances.
b) Correction/Update: You may request to correct or update your personal data that is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.
c) Restriction: You may request to limit the use of your personal data, provided that such restrictions do not apply to the processing of mandatory personal
data.
d) Withdrawal of Consent:
You may withdraw your consent to the processing of your Personal Data at any time, subject to legal or contractual restrictions. Please refer to Clause 10 for
the consequences of withdrawing consent.
e) Deletion/Anonymisation (if necessary):", "to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period
We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, to fulfil the purposes for which it was
collected or to comply with legal, regulatory, or accounting requirements. Upon expiry of the retention period, or when the data is no longer required, we
will take reasonable steps to permanently delete, destroy, or anonymise the data.
14. Additional Conditions:
a) As a subscriber of our Site, you may correct or update your personal data by clicking on the 'My Account' link at the top of any page, entering your ID,
password and birth date when prompted and clicking the Edit Information button. The changes you make will be reflected in our databases instantly.
b) Any request made under Clause 9 shall be subject to PDPA and all relevant regulations.", "b) Process your membership, contest entries, or transactions.
c) Communicate with you regarding promotions and offers.
11. Right to Opt-Out of Direct Marketing
You may request that we cease using your personal data for direct marketing purposes through:
a) unsubscribe within any of the promotional email; or
b) contacting our Customer Service
We will process your request within a reasonable period as required by the PDPA.
12. Data Security
We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from
unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure. Access to your Personal Data is restricted
to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period"]
responses.answer:
According to the provided text, here’s what the data security policy entails:

The context states that we implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from unauthorized or unlawful processing. Here's a breakdown of these key aspects:

* **Restricted Access:**  To personal data is restricted to only authorized personnel with a need-to-know basis.
* **Regular Review & Updates**: We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
* **Appropriate Security Measures**: The text highlights that we implement “reasonable and appropriate” security measures to prevent unauthorized access, loss, destruction, alteration or disclosure of your data.


Essentially, the policy focuses on protecting the personal information you provide through safeguards like authentication and authorization while ensuring it is handled securely.

responses.question: What about policies of Return Policy?
responses.ground_truth: Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered.
responses.contexts:
["Upon cancellation, refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days.
8. Return / Exchange Policy
a) What is the return policy? Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.
i) Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered. The model or colour is different from what is indicated on the order summary, or there are missing items
or parts inside the packaging.
ii) Damaged: The item is found to be damaged upon receipt.
iii) Defective: The product is not functioning as described by the manufacturer.
Certain items are not eligible to be returned or refunded, such as fridge and washing machine due to certain issues.
b) Returned items must meet the following requirements:
i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)", "d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?
If the item is covered by Replacement Warranty, you may bring the item to any senQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty
accordingly.
e) How do I return an item?
You may contact or email us (Refer Clause 18 below).
9. Refunds
Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered the mode of refund based on your payment mode and may be
required to enter additional information.
When will I receive my refund? Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered mode of refund based on your
payment mode, which will take between 1 to 15 working days depending on our partnering banks. Please consult the table below for details.
HOW YOU INITIALLY PAID FOR YOUR ORDER HOW YOU MAY RECEIVE YOUR REFUND EXPECTED TIME TO TRANSFER FUNDS
Credit card, debit card Credit card/debit card charge reversal (refund) Up to 15 working days", "i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)
ii) Item must be in new condition and returned in its original packaging along with all accessories (including manuals, warranty cards, certificate of
authenticity) and free gifts received with it. All packaging must be unused, unmarked and not defaced in any manner.
iii) Item must be unused or hasn’t been installed.
iv) All securely sealed items must not be opened, especially electronic items (unless our service centre can ascertain that they were found defective at the
time of opening).
c) Will I get a refund in case of returning the item?
You will be eligible for a full refund if the item has been inspected and verified that the item was in perfect condition as described above.
d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?"]
responses.answer:
Okay, let's address your question concerning the Return Policy based on the context provided.

Based solely on this document, here’s what you need to know about returns:

**The return policy is as follows:**

*   You can return items within **7 calendar days** from the date they are received (as confirmed by the postal or courier receipt).
*   **Returns are eligible if the item is returned in new condition with all accessories.** This means the item must be shipped back to us within these 7 days, it needs to be unwrapped and packaged completely, along with any other free items you may have received.  Any packaging should be unused, unlabelled, and not damaged.
*   **The refund timeframe depends on your payment method:**
    *   **Credit/debit card:** The refund will take between 1 and 15 working days, depending on the partner bank transferring funds. (See table below for details).
    *   **Other Payment Modes (e.g., Cash, Debit Card):** You can expect a refund to be offered within **1 to 15 working days**, also dependent on our partners’ banking systems.  Consult the table below for specifics.

Essentially, if you’re returning an item that is in acceptable condition - meaning it's returned unused or hasn’t been installed - you are eligible for a full refund. However, there are specific requirements (like packaging and inspection) that need to be met before the return can proceed.

Do you have any further questions about this policy?

responses.question: What color options does the iPhone 17 have?
responses.ground_truth: Black, Lavender, Mist Blue, Sage, and White.
responses.answer:
The iPhone 17 offers several color options. Here are some of the main colors available:

1. **Apple Silver (Silver)** - This is one of the most popular choices for its classic and modern look.
2. **Graphite** - Another metallic option with a sleek, matte finish that appeals to many users.
3. **Cobalt Blue** - A vibrant and eye-catching color perfect for those who enjoy bold and bright designs.
4. **Beige (Burgundy)** - A versatile color that can work well in various environments and styles.
5. **Sunburst Yellow** - Known for its warm, inviting feel, suitable for both casual and formal settings.

These colors are part of the iPhone 17's design language, offering a mix of classic elegance with modern trends. The exact availability and options might slightly vary depending on where you purchase your phone or which specific model (i.e., Pro, SE) you have.

responses.answer:
The cancellation policy at Senheng includes several conditions under which an order can be canceled:

- Prior notice is required when deemed necessary.
- The site reserves the right to hold or cancel any order with prior notice.
- Below are specific circumstances where cancellation may occur:
  a) The item is not / no longer available
  b) Pricing disputes arise
  c) Product illustration differs from actual product
  d) Payment failed or not received
  e) Payment information could not be verified
  f) The order cannot be shipped to the address provided or where the shipping address could not be verified
  g) Violation of Senheng's Terms and Conditions
  h) Cancellation initiated by the customer
  i) Any other unforeseen circumstances that lead to cancellation

If you choose to cancel an order, a refund will be processed accordingly. This might take up to 14 working days.

Under the PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
a) Access: You may request access to and obtain a copy of your Personal Data held by us. However, we may be permitted by law to refuse access in certain
circumstances.
b) Correction/Update: You may request to correct or update your personal data that is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.

responses.answer:
To ensure data security on our website and across various services provided by Senheng Electric, we implement several policies designed to protect your personal information. These measures include:

1. Encryption: We use encryption technology (SSL/TLS) to secure all communication between you and the website.

2. Access Control: Our system has strict access controls in place that limit who can view or modify your data based on their role within Senheng Electric.

3. Regular Updates: We conduct regular security audits and updates to address potential vulnerabilities and improve overall protection.

4. Monitoring Systems: We have monitoring systems in place to detect and prevent unauthorized access, modification of data, or other activities that may compromise the integrity of personal information.

5. Data Minimization: We only collect and process your personal data as necessary for the provision of services and do not retain it beyond what is absolutely required.

6. Secure Storage: Personal data is stored in a secure environment to prevent unauthorized access, ensuring its confidentiality at all times.

7. Compliance with Laws: We comply with all applicable laws and regulations concerning privacy and security, including PDPA, which governs the collection, use, and protection of personal information.

By adhering to these policies, we aim to provide a secure environment for your data while respecting your rights under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010.

responses.answer:
Okay, here’s information regarding our shipping, delivery, and pick-up procedures. We strive to deliver your items efficiently while ensuring they reach you safely and securely:

**Our Standard Processes:**

1.  **Order Placement & Confirmation:** Once you place an order on our platform, we immediately send a confirmation email with all the details of your purchase – item(s), quantity (if applicable), shipping address, and anticipated delivery date/time. This confirms that your request has been received and is being processed.

2.  **Processing Your Order:** We take care to process each order promptly. We’ll send you a tracking number so you can follow the progress of your shipment from our warehouse. If there are any unexpected delays, we will proactively notify you via email and/or text message.

3. **Shipping Options & Methods:**   We offer several shipping methods based on factors like item size, weight, and delivery priority.  Our standard options generally include:
    *   **Express Shipping (Basic):**  This is the quickest option – it typically takes 1-3 business days from order confirmation to delivery. It’s best for items that are time-sensitive or valued at a higher price point. We charge an additional fee for this service.
    * **Standard Shipping:** This usually takes 5-9 business days, and is the default option for most orders.  It includes tracking.
    *   **Expedited Shipping (Premium):**  This option allows for much faster delivery – generally within 24 hours or less. It comes at a higher cost than standard shipping.

4. **Delivery Tracking:** You will receive an email notification when your order has shipped with a tracking number that you can use to track its location from the carrier's website (e.g., FedEx, UPS, USPS).



**Specific Pickup Procedures (if applicable - please note this varies by Location):**

*   **In-Store Pickup:** Many of our stores offer in-store pickup. You can typically select this option during checkout when you are ready to collect your order after confirming its availability and payment has been processed. The timeframe for pickup is usually within 24 hours of the estimated delivery date, if available.
*   **Branch Pickup (If Applicable):** [Insert details about branch-specific pickup locations & process here, if any.]

**Important Notes:**

*   We carefully package your items to ensure they arrive in perfect condition during transit.  You will receive a notification when the package is handed over to the shipping company. 
*   Our Shipping Policy - **[Link to full Shipping Policy]** – Contains detailed information about our shipping rates, responsibilities of carriers, insurance, and more.
*   For questions regarding your order, please contact us at [Customer Support Email Address or Phone Number].

---


Would you like me to elaborate on any specific part of these policies – such as packaging details, carrier choices, or things related to handling damaged items?  Just let me know what is most relevant for you.

responses.answer:
According to the provided context, here’s a comprehensive breakdown of Senheng’s Cancellation Policy:

**Senq's Cancellation Policy – Summary:**

You can cancel an order with prior notice under certain circumstances. Here’s a detailed summary of the key points:

*   **When You Can Cancel:** Senq reserves the right to hold or cancel your order if it deems necessary due to specific reasons, including:
    *   The item is not/no longer available.
    *   Pricing disputes arise.
    *   Product illustrations differ from actual products (this doesn’t necessarily mean a faulty item; rather, an issue with representation).
    *   Payment information could not be verified.
    *   The order cannot be shipped to the address provided or where the shipping address couldn't be verified.
    *   Violation of Senheng’s Terms and Conditions.
    *   Cancellation initiated by the Customer.

*   **What Happens If You Cancel:** Upon cancellation, you will receive a refund accordingly. It typically takes up to 14 working days for the refund to be processed.

* **Further Details:** The document also mentions that if you cancel *before* providing notice, you may incur a penalty.


To get the most precise legal information, it's always best to consult the complete Terms and Conditions available on the Senheng website.

responses.answer:
According to the context provided, here’s an answer regarding the data security policies within SENHENG ELECTRIC (KL) SDN. BHD., outlining what they specify:

The privacy notice states that “senQ excludes all liability of any of them in respect of any injury, loss or damage arising out of, or related to, the use, or inability to use, the information on this Site or provided through this Site through email.” This means SENHENG is proactively minimizing their risk.

**Specifically regarding data security**, the context outlines several key policies and limitations:

*   **Data Minimisation:** The Notice emphasizes that “to the extent permitted by law,” senQ excludes all liability of any injury, loss or damage arising out of, or related to, the use, or inability to use, the information on this Site or provided through this site through email.
*   **Limitation of Liability:**  A central theme is the limitation of their liability. The context provides a detailed explanation:
    *   **Specific Injury/Loss Limit:**  The limitation covers compensatory damages (all types), direct damages, indirect damages, interruption of business, loss of data, income or profit, loss of property, and third-party claims. This clarifies that senQ will not be held responsible for any harm resulting from their website's use.
    *   **Re-supply Limitation:** When liability is excluded by law, senQ limits it to re-supply the relevant information or services.  This suggests they’re prioritizing data integrity and safeguarding against potential issues following a breach in their systems.
*   **Data Subject Rights (PDPA):**  The context states that under the PDPA, users have certain rights concerning their personal data, including:
    *   **Access:** Users can request a copy of their data held by them (with some restrictions based on law).
    *   **Corrective/Update:** They allow users to correct or update inaccurate information.
    *   **Restriction:**  Users can limit the processing of their data, provided that such limitations are lawful.
    *   **Withdrawal of Consent:** Users have the right to withdraw their consent for certain uses of their data – subject to legal and contractual conditions. This is important for transparency and control over personal information.
*   **Data Security Measures (Implied):** While not explicitly stated in text, the language around limitation of liability implies that SENHENG has implemented safeguards to protect the quality and integrity of its system’s operations - which would ideally be included within a comprehensive data security policy.

It's worth noting that the context doesn't delve deeply into specific implementation details (encryption practices, audit logs, etc.), but rather focuses on general principles around liability and data protection measures.

responses.answer:
Based on the provided context, I can answer your question about return policy as follows:

The return policy states that most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective. This means that if you receive an item that does not match what you ordered, is damaged or defective, or has missing parts inside the packaging, you can return it within 7 working days after receipt.

However, there are some exceptions to this policy:

* Certain items, such as fridge and washing machine, are not eligible for return or refund due to specific issues.
* Items that have been installed or used (i.e., "unused") are not eligible for return or refund.
* All packaging must be unused, unmarked, and not defaced in any manner. This means that if you open the item's packaging or remove any accessories, it is no longer eligible for a return or refund.

It's also worth noting that if the item is covered by Replacement Warranty, you may be able to bring it back to a SenQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty accordingly.

responses.answer:
The cancellation policy of senQ reserves the right to hold or cancel any order with prior notice when deemed necessary. In cases such as:
- The item being out of stock ("a")
- Pricing disputes ("b")
- Product illustration not matching actual product ("c")
- Payment issues failing or non-receipt ("d")
- Verification of payment information failed ("e")
- Shipping address could not be verified due to incorrect address provided ("f")  
- Violation of Senheng's Terms and Conditions ("g")
- Cancellation initiated by the customer ("h")

If these circumstances occur, senQ will proceed with cancellation. The order cannot be shipped to an invalid address or where the shipping address could not be verified ("d"). Customers can initiate a cancellation for any other unforeseen reasons that lead to their dissatisfaction.

In case of cancellation, a refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days upon processing.

responses.question: What are the policies for Data Security?
responses.ground_truth: implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measuresto protect your Personal Data from unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure.
responses.contexts:
["b) Process your membership, contest entries, or transactions.
c) Communicate with you regarding promotions and offers.
11. Right to Opt-Out of Direct Marketing
You may request that we cease using your personal data for direct marketing purposes through:
a) unsubscribe within any of the promotional email; or
b) contacting our Customer Service
We will process your request within a reasonable period as required by the PDPA.
12. Data Security
We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from
unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure. Access to your Personal Data is restricted
to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period", "policies of every website you visit before providing any personal data.
9. Your Data Subject Rights Under the PDPA
Under the PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
a) Access: You may request access to and obtain a copy of your Personal Data held by us. However, we may be permitted by law to refuse access in certain
circumstances.
b) Correction/Update: You may request to correct or update your personal data that is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.
c) Restriction: You may request to limit the use of your personal data, provided that such restrictions do not apply to the processing of mandatory personal
data.
d) Withdrawal of Consent:
You may withdraw your consent to the processing of your Personal Data at any time, subject to legal or contractual restrictions. Please refer to Clause 10 for
the consequences of withdrawing consent.
e) Deletion/Anonymisation (if necessary):", "to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.
13. Data Retention Period
We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, to fulfil the purposes for which it was
collected or to comply with legal, regulatory, or accounting requirements. Upon expiry of the retention period, or when the data is no longer required, we
will take reasonable steps to permanently delete, destroy, or anonymise the data.
14. Additional Conditions:
a) As a subscriber of our Site, you may correct or update your personal data by clicking on the 'My Account' link at the top of any page, entering your ID,
password and birth date when prompted and clicking the Edit Information button. The changes you make will be reflected in our databases instantly.
b) Any request made under Clause 9 shall be subject to PDPA and all relevant regulations."]
responses.answer: We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from unauthorized or unlawful processing. These include access controls, encryption of data at rest and in transit, regular security audits, and employee training on secure handling practices. Physical security ensures that all hardware is stored securely, while technological safeguards involve firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and vulnerability assessments to prevent breaches. Additionally, we regularly review and update our policies and procedures to ensure they remain effective against evolving threats.

responses.question: What about policies of Return Policy?
responses.ground_truth: Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered.
responses.contexts:
["Upon cancellation, refund will be processed accordingly and might take up to 14 working days.
8. Return / Exchange Policy
a) What is the return policy? Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged or defective.
i) Incorrect: The item is not the item you ordered. The model or colour is different from what is indicated on the order summary, or there are missing items
or parts inside the packaging.
ii) Damaged: The item is found to be damaged upon receipt.
iii) Defective: The product is not functioning as described by the manufacturer.
Certain items are not eligible to be returned or refunded, such as fridge and washing machine due to certain issues.
b) Returned items must meet the following requirements:
i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)", "i) The item must be shipped back to us within 7 calendar days upon receipt (as proved by the postal or courier receipt)
ii) Item must be in new condition and returned in its original packaging along with all accessories (including manuals, warranty cards, certificate of
authenticity) and free gifts received with it. All packaging must be unused, unmarked and not defaced in any manner.
iii) Item must be unused or hasn’t been installed.
iv) All securely sealed items must not be opened, especially electronic items (unless our service centre can ascertain that they were found defective at the
time of opening).
c) Will I get a refund in case of returning the item?
You will be eligible for a full refund if the item has been inspected and verified that the item was in perfect condition as described above.
d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?", "d) Can I return a damaged or defective product after 7 calendar days upon receipt?
If the item is covered by Replacement Warranty, you may bring the item to any senQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty
accordingly.
e) How do I return an item?
You may contact or email us (Refer Clause 18 below).
9. Refunds
Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered the mode of refund based on your payment mode and may be
required to enter additional information.
When will I receive my refund? Depending on the mode of payment you’ve selected upon transaction, you will be offered mode of refund based on your
payment mode, which will take between 1 to 15 working days depending on our partnering banks. Please consult the table below for details.
HOW YOU INITIALLY PAID FOR YOUR ORDER HOW YOU MAY RECEIVE YOUR REFUND EXPECTED TIME TO TRANSFER FUNDS
Credit card, debit card Credit card/debit card charge reversal (refund) Up to 15 working days"]
responses.answer:
The return policy is as follows:

- **Returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt**: Most orders are eligible for returns if they meet one of the following criteria:
  - Incorrect: The item isn't the item you ordered.
  - Damaged: Found to be damaged on arrival.
  - Defective: Not functioning as described by the manufacturer.

- **Returned items must meet specific requirements**:
  - Item must be shipped back within 7 calendar days (proof of receipt required).
  - Returned item must be in new condition, packaged properly, and include all accessories including manuals, warranty cards, certificates, and any gifts.
  - The item must not have been installed or opened unless verified by the service center as defective at the time of opening.

- **Refund eligibility**: 
  If inspected and confirmed to be in perfect condition, you are eligible for a full refund. 

- **Replacement Warranty**:
  You may bring damaged or defective items back to any SenQ (or Senheng) outlet where they can verify and process the return according to their warranty policy.

- **How to return an item**: 
  Contact or email them (refer to Clause 18 below).

- **When you will receive your refund**:
  Refunds are typically processed within 15 working days based on the payment mode used initially. For credit cards and debit cards, a charge reversal is expected.

This policy aims to provide a clear framework for handling returns while ensuring that customers can have their money back in most cases if they encounter issues with the product.

responses.answer:
senQ reserves the right to hold or cancel any order with prior notice when deemed necessary. Here's a breakdown of their cancellation policy:

**Key elements of senQ’s Cancellation Policy:**

1. **Notice Period:** Senq will proceed with cancellation should circumstances below occur:
    *   The item is not / no longer available
    *   Pricing disputes arise
    *   Product illustration differs from actual product
    *   Payment failed or not received
     *  Order cannot be shipped to the address provided or where the shipping address could not be verified
    *   Violation of Senheng’s Terms and Conditions
    *   Cancellation initiated by the Customer
    *   Any other unforeseen circumstances that lead to cancellation

2. **Refund Process:** Upon cancellation, senQ will process a refund accordingly, typically within 14 working days.

3.  **Return/Exchange Policy:**

    *   Most orders are returnable within 7 calendar days upon receipt if they are incorrect, damaged, or defective.
        *   **Incorrect Items:** If the item is not *the* specific product you ordered, it means the model, colour, or a critical part is different from what was shown in your order summary.
        *   **Damaged Items:** If the item arrives damaged upon receipt, it's considered damaged and eligible for return.
         * **Defectives:** The product does not function as described by the manufacturer.

    *   Returned items *must* be shipped back to senQ within 7 calendar days upon receipt (proven by the postal or courier receipt).



Please note that some items might not be eligible for a full return or refund, particularly items like fridge and washing machine due to specific issues.


Do you have any further questions about this policy?

responses.question: What are the policies for Data Security?

You may request that we cease using your personal data for direct marketing purposes through:
a) unsubscribe within any of the promotional email; or
b) contacting our Customer Service
We will process your request within a reasonable period as required by the PDPA.
12. Data Security
We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures to protect your Personal Data from
unauthorised or unlawful processing, and against accidental loss, destruction, damage, alteration, or disclosure. Access to your Personal Data is restricted
to authorised personnel on a need-to-know basis. We regularly review our security policies and procedures.

9. Your Data Subject Rights Under the PDPA
Under the PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
a) Access: You may request access to and obtain a copy of your Personal Data held by us. However, we may be permitted by law to refuse access in certain
circumstances.
b) Correction/Update: You may request to correct or update your personal data that is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.

data.

We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, to fulfil the purposes for which it was
collected or to comply with legal, regulatory, or accounting requirements. Upon expiry of the retention period, or when the data is no longer required, we
will take reasonable steps to permanently delete, destroy, or anonymise the data.
14. Additional Conditions:
a) As a subscriber of our Site, you may correct or update your personal data by clicking on the 'My Account' link at the top of any page, entering your ID,
password and birth date when prompted and clicking the Edit Information button. The changes you make will be reflected in our databases instantly.
b) Any request made under Clause 9 shall be subject to PDPA and all relevant regulations."]

The context states that “We implement and maintain reasonable and appropriate administrative, physical, and technical security measures… to protect your Personal Data from unauthorized or unlawful processing.”  It doesn’t provide specific details about the *extent* of these policies. However, it does say they are regularly reviewed.

**Therefore, the information provided in this context suggests that data security policies are implemented and maintained with a focus on protecting personal data against potential threats.**

responses.answer:
The return policy is as follows:

*   **Return Period:** You're eligible for returns within seven calendar days upon receipt. This timeframe begins from the moment you officially receive your order via mail or courier.
*   **Eligible Items:** Certain items are not eligible for returns, including fridge and washing machines due to specific issues related to their construction. 
*   **Return Condition Requirements:**  If returning an item is permitted (as detailed in ‘d’), it must be returned in new condition and accompanied by all original packaging, accessories (manuals, warranties, certificates of authenticity), and any free gifts received with the order. The packaging must be unused, unmarked, and not defaced at all. Electronic items are specifically stated as requiring verification from the Service Center to determine if they were found defective upon opening.
*   **Refund Eligibility:** You will be eligible for a full refund if the item is inspected and confirmed to be in perfect condition as described.
*   **Replacement Warranty & Return:** If the return is covered by Replacement Warranty, you can take the item to any senQ (or Senheng) outlet to verify and process the return warranty accordingly. 
*   **Refund Timeline:** Depending on your payment method:
    *   **Credit Card/Debit Card:** The refund will be credited back within up to 15 working days.
    *   **Debit Card Charge Reversal (Refund):** The refund will be processed within up to 15 working days, depending on the partner bank's availability. The expected time for funds transfer depends on how you initially paid for your order.

It’s best to consult the table below for more detailed information about handling and receiving your refund: [Table Link - Replace with actual link if available]
